reasoning: The informal statement asserts that the double integral ∬_R (11 - 2x - 3y²) dxdy over R = [1,3] × [-2,5] equals -168. The Lean formalization encodes this as an iterated Bochner integral ∫ x in Icc 1 3, ∫ y in Icc (-2) 5, (11 - 2x - 3y²) = -168 with the standard (Lebesgue) volume measure. Since the integrand is continuous and the rectangle is compact, f is bounded and integrable, so by Fubini's theorem the iterated integral equals the double integral over R. The function, the bounds [1,3] and [-2,5], and the target value -168 all match exactly.
